calendar.matters:
For Determination That The Proposed Petition Is Not A Contest Of The Trust
Off Calendar Jul-30-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Lau for Pak Lee (Petitioner).

The Court denied the Petition for Determination That The Proposed Petition Is Not A Contest Of The Trust on the basis that it is a Safe Harbor Petition based on Probate Code section 21320 which has been repealed. The Court also stated that it has no authority or statutory jurisdiction to issue an order on the matter.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.
